acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Runbook conventions were read before work.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: docs/ORCHESTRATION.md and docs/LINUX_ORCHESTRATOR.md were read at the start of the node.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Hosted nightly workflow dispatch from main was attempted with the required gh command.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: evidence/m4-nightly-full-workflow-dispatch/commands.log records the exact command and HTTP 403 response.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Triggered run was identified and watched to completion.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: evidence/m4-nightly-full-workflow-dispatch/nightly-run.md records no run id or URL because no run was created.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Failure evidence and unblock recommendation are recorded without claiming success.
Required evidence and qd report files are present.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Hosted nightly validation is required but blocked before run creation by GitHub credential authorization; no nightly success is claimed.

findings.title: Active gh credential cannot dispatch nightly workflow
findings.observed: GitHub returned HTTP 403 Resource not accessible by integration for the workflow dispatch endpoint.
findings.expected: The active gh credential can create workflow_dispatch events for cat-cave/madobe so nightly.yml can be run from main.
